name: Strive to Surpass me, Roronoa Zoro!!!

issues.description: PowerBoost action is missing the cost condition. The effect states 'You may rest 1 of your cards' — this is a cost that must be represented as a condition before the action, not a separate trigger.
Second effect with trigger 'Trigger' and targeting opponent's character is incorrect. The card text does not mention affecting opponent cards. This entire effect should be removed.
Duration should be 'DuringThisBattle' not 'EndOfBattle' to match 'during this battle' in card text.
